title: 6 Nights Wings Over the Wilderness Safari
description: Experience Kenya’s wilderness from the skies on this fly-in safari to Samburu and Maasai Mara. Discover rugged northern landscapes and vast savannah plains with luxury stays, guided game drives and unforgettable wildlife encounters.
highlights: Game drives in custom 4x4 safari vehicles

itinerary.title: Fly to Samburu
itinerary.description: Depart from Wilson Airport to Samburu Game Reserve. Transfer to camp and enjoy an afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Samburu Safari
itinerary.description: Full day game drives exploring Samburu’s rugged terrain and unique wildlife species.

itinerary.title: Samburu Safari
itinerary.description: Another full day in Samburu with morning and afternoon game drives.

itinerary.title: Fly to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Scheduled flight to Maasai Mara followed by an afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day exploring Maasai Mara with opportunities to spot the Big Five and migration wildlife.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Another full day of game drives with optional bush dinner and sundowner experiences.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Fly back to Nairobi Wilson Airport for departure.

included: Full board accommodation at safari camps
Park entrance fees for Samburu and Maasai Mara
Twice daily game drives with professional guide
Selected beverages including soft drinks, beers and house wines
accommodation: Soroi Luxury Migration Camp – Maasai Mara (3 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Light clothing for daytime and warmer layers for early mornings and evenings. Comfortable safari wear recommended.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals with a mix of international and local cuisine, including bush dining experiences.

note: Pricing is indicative and depends on season and number of travelers.
